description: AI agent toolkit to edit RPG Maker MV: maps, events, database, knowledge-driven map generation
name: io.github.DiegoLopez0208/rpgmaker-mv-ultimate

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the RPG Maker MV project to edit (the folder with data/ and js/). The server starts without it; needed for real editing, or call set_project_path at runtime.
environmentVariables.name: RPGMAKER_PROJECT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of an OpenAI-compatible vision endpoint to enable analyze_image mode "ai" (e.g. https://api.openai.com or http://localhost:11434). Unset = vision disabled; every other tool works offline.
environmentVariables.name: VISION_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the vision endpoint (only sent when set).
environmentVariables.name: VISION_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Vision model name to request (e.g. gpt-4o, llava). Defaults to meta/llama-3.2-90b-vision-instruct.
environmentVariables.name: VISION_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to also advertise the 101 legacy v4 tool names (they remain callable regardless of this flag).
environmentVariables.name: RPGMV_LEGACY_TOOLS

title: RPG Maker MV Ultimate MCP
